int4_vs_p1bf16_same_engine.note: cached-chain, same engine, both chains drift identically -> isolates INT4 quantization noise (registered spec note)

hard_flip_attribution.note: shared = flip already present in P1 bf16 (drift/port carried through, not INT4-introduced); int4_only = candidate quant-noise flips -> p2_adjudicate fresh-refeeds them
